title: wolfhsm tests: advanced (tests 18-20)
description: Integration tests for CryptoCb and signer traits. cryptocb_routes_to_hsm: call register(), make wolfcrypt call with WH_DEV_ID — verify it succeeds; drop guard, same call — verify it fails. signer_trait_ecc: EccP256Key::signer() satisfies signature::Signer<DerSignature> bound, sign a known message, verify with p256 crate. signer_trait_ed25519: Ed25519Key::signer() satisfies signature::Signer<ed25519::Signature> bound, sign and verify with ed25519-dalek.
